name: Home Assistant
author: InSpectre
description: Publishes InSpectre device state to Home Assistant via MQTT Auto-Discovery. Each network device gets presence, IP address, open-ports count, and vulnerability sensors in Home Assistant. A system device tracks total devices online, vulnerabilities, and scan state.

config_schema.label: Broker Host
config_schema.help: MQTT broker hostname or IP address (e.g. 192.168.0.1).

config_schema.label: Username
config_schema.help: MQTT username (leave blank if authentication is not required).

config_schema.label: Password
config_schema.help: MQTT password (leave blank if authentication is not required).

config_schema.label: Discovery Prefix
config_schema.help: MQTT discovery prefix configured in Home Assistant (default: homeassistant).

config_schema.label: State Prefix
config_schema.help: MQTT topic prefix for InSpectre state messages (default: inspectre).

test_connection.description: Connect to the MQTT broker and verify connectivity

publish_device_joined.description: Publish HA discovery config and initial online state for a newly discovered device

publish_device_renamed.description: Re-publish HA discovery config after a device is renamed
